scripts.dev: bash -lc 'export PATH=/app/node_modules/.bin:$PATH; npm run build && tsc -w -p tsconfig.json --preserveWatchOutput & TSC_PID=$!; trap "kill $TSC_PID" EXIT INT TERM; node --watch dist/src/server.js'
scripts.db:import:all: npm run db:import:static && npm run db:import:quest2 && npm run db:import:characters
